The Five Beast Lock.name: 五兽锁 The Five Beast Lock
The Five Beast Lock.text:
解开谜题

英雄们将有机会尝试几种不同的方法来解决如何进入神殿的谜题。

遭遇模式：建议将他们置于遭遇模式中以保持动作顺序清晰，尽管这并非传统的陷阱。在本段中使用探索活动也是可以接受的。

五兽之锁

低危 4

30VP

尽管这把锁是个谜题，你可以鼓励玩家用他们的技能而不是作为玩家的知识来应对；或奖励他们尝试这么做（给予一个英雄点或一条线索）。

谜题锁谜语（来自书中）- 仅供GM参考

这是给GM的快速参考。它是一组线索，告诉他们如何开始、该站在哪些地砖上、以及最后该站在哪一块上。注：在我的高级模组中有此谜题的自动化版本。

  1. 我们皆为野兽，入栏而斗，且在首领之后

  2. 五兽成群，但每栏仅容一兽

  3. 无论面向何方，任何野兽都不得立于他者之路

  4. 野兽不得同立于门槛，否则便会相斗

  5. 当最弱者最后入内受伤，群落便会降下

运作方式 - GM参考

  1. 要启动升降梯/解开进入神殿的谜题，所有五名玩家必须按照谜语站在正确的地砖上

  2. 踏上第一块正确地砖（栏位3）会启动所有地砖、内部钢墙，以及谜题

  3. 在启动后踏上任何错误地砖，将在英雄所踏的错误地砖上启动伤害循环

  4. 谜题锁启动后，其余四块正确地砖中的三块可以在不踏到错误地砖的情况下触发（因为正确地砖都在边缘）——见示意图

  5. 最后一块地砖（栏位4）需要一名英雄/生物承受伤害才能启动（因此谜语第5条线索）；一旦启动，外侧栏墙会升起，同时一个钢制闩锁翻起锁住屋顶并启动升降梯

解法

  • 最终站位见图

英雄必须站在正确的地砖上并保持不动，直到升降梯启动。若队伍少于五个生物（可以使用动物伙伴或可被召唤且体型为小型或更大的生物——它不会对无生命物品作出反应）。

  1. 栏位3

  2. 栏位1、2或5（顺序无关）

  3. 栏位1、2或5（顺序无关）

  4. 栏位1、2或5（顺序无关）

  5. 栏位4

减值（进程）

如果英雄们做出错误选择，或他们试图解除/破解且出现大成功或大失败中的大失败，那么保护机制将以规则方式启动一个效果

  1. 第一次错误：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{迷魂}

  2. 第二次错误：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded 1}

  3. 第三次错误：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}

  4. 第四次错误：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}

  5. 第五次错误：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}

  6. 第六次及之后的错误：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}（后续失败时提高）

技能检定

[若任一英雄使用调查——书中：添加一个环境加值]

解除 -（DC20 - 3段进程）

一名英雄可以尝试绕过谜题并对“首领”地砖（栏位3）进行开锁

  1. 大成功或大失败中的大成功：2段进程

  2. 成功：1段进程

  3. 失败：0段进程

  4. 大成功或大失败中的大失败：-1段进程并折断开锁工具

调查（难度进程）

可使用宗教、Society、Thievery

  1. 第一次尝试（DC20）：注意到苔藓下的铺砖区域以及其上方的一段文字，译为“五兽之锁”——这是一个动态谜题锁，它会在错误猜测时启动状态流程

  2. 第二次尝试（DC22）：顺序可能稍微重要，但通常更多与正确组合（站位）有关

  3. 第三次尝试（DC25）：一旦通过让五个生物站在正确地砖上而解开，整个笼栏将关闭，显露通往内部的道路

  4. 第四次尝试（DC30）：注意到地砖上的晦涩符文，其中一些与其他不同

  5. 第五次尝试（DC32）：读出符文——力量、诡计、梦魇术、变化、家族（独特的那些），其余的都写着“Aberrance”（受训于宗教者也会得知这些是拉玛什图的领域）

  6. 第六次尝试（DC35）：给出最佳顺序或下一块该站的地砖的提示

遭遇结束：当英雄们解开谜题锁并下降时。

朗读以下内容：

墙壁震颤着没入黑暗裂隙，与岩石侧壁摩擦。你所知的那点自然光已被抛在身后……

Solving the puzzle

The heroes will have an opportunity to attempt several different approaches to solving the puzzle on how to enter The Temple.

Encounter Mode: Placing them in encounter mode to keep sequence of actions straight is recommended even though this is not a traditional trap. Using Exploration Activities during this section is acceptable.

Five Beast Lock

LOW 4

30VP

While this lock is a puzzle, you can encourage the players to use their skills versus their knowledge as players or reward them for attempting to do so by a Hero Point or a clue.

Puzzle Lock Riddle (from book) - for GM reference Only

This is a quick reference for the GM. It is the set of clues that tell them how to start it, which tiles to stand on, and which once to stand on last. Note: There is an automated version of this puzzle in my the premium module.

  1. We are all beasts, enter the pens and engage after the Alpha

  2. Five beasts make a pack, but only one beast per pen

  3. No beast shall stand in another's path no matter which direction they face

  4. No beasts shall stand at thresholds together less they come to blows

  5. The decent of the pack will come when the runt is harmed by entering last

How it works - GM reference

  1. In order to activate the elevator/solve puzzle to enter the temple, all five players must be standing on the correct tiles according to the riddle

  2. Stepping on the first right tile (Pen 3) activates all the tiles, the inside steel walls, and the puzzle

  3. Stepping on any incorrect tiles after it is activated will activate damage cycles on wrong tiles in which heros step

  4. Once puzzle lock is active, three of remaining four correct tiles can be engaged without stepping on a wrong tile (since the right tiles are on edges) - see diagram

  5. The last tile (Pen 4) requires a hero/creature to take damage to activate (thus clue 5 in the riddle), once activated the outer pen walls will rise as well as a steel latch flips up locking the roof and activating elevator

Solution

  • See Figure for final standing

Heroes must stand on the correct tile and stay on it until elevator activates. If the party has less than five creatures (animal companions or creatures that can be summoned that have a size of small or greater can be used - it will not respond to inanimate items).

  1. Pen 3

  2. Pen 1,2, or 5 (sequence does not matter)

  3. Pen 1,2, or 5 (sequence does not matter)

  4. Pen 1,2, or 5 (sequence does not matter)

  5. Pen 4

Penalty (Progression)

If the heroes make the wrong selection or if they attempt to disable it/hack it and critically fail, then the protective mechanism will mechanically activate an effect

  1. First Error: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated}

  2. Second Error: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded 1}

  3. Third Error: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}

  4. Fourth Error: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}

  5. Fifth Error: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}

  6. Sixth+ Errors: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (Increase on subsequent fails)

Skill Checks

[Add a circumstance bonus if any hero used Investigate - Book]

Disable - (DC20 - 3 progressions)

A hero could attempt to bypass the puzzle and pick the lock of the "Alpha" tile (pen 3)

  1. Critical Success: 2 progressions

  2. Success: 1 progression

  3. Failure: 0 progression

  4. Critical Failure: -1 progression and break lockpick

Investigate (Difficulty Progression)

Can use Religion, Society, Thievery

  1. First Attempt (DC20): Notice tiled area under the moss with a script above it translated "The Five Beast Lock" - This is a dynamic puzzle lock, it activates condition routines with incorrect guesses

  2. Second Attempt (DC22): Sequence may matter a little but usually these more have to do with correct combinations (placements)

  3. Third Attempt (DC25): Once solved by having Five Creatures stand on correct tile, the entire cages will close revealing way within

  4. Fourth Attempt (DC30): Notice obscure runes on the tiles and some are different than others

  5. Fifth Attempt (DC32): Read the runes - Might, Trickery, Nightmares, Change, Family (unique ones), the other ones all say "Aberrance" (Trained in Religion, also tells them these are the domains of Lamashtu

  6. Sixth Attempt (DC35): Give hint of best order or which tile to stand on next

The Encounter ends: when heroes solve the puzzle lock and descend.

Read the following:

The walls vibrate into the dark chasm rubbing against the sides of rock. What natural light you knew has left you behind…

Discovery Progression.name: 发现进阶 Discovery Progression
Discovery Progression.text:
手动揭示发现的指南

注意：此谜题在我的高级模组中为全自动，包括效果、逻辑追踪与音效。

当英雄们第一次接近该区域时，他们可能正在进行搜索或调查行动，以寻找留下的踪迹或这个“死胡同”。在 DC 汇总中，会说明何时揭示或切换一块地形砖。如果那份文字版 DC 指南不够，你可以用下方内容作为参考。

初始区域 - “较大的地形砖”

这块地形砖有两张图片：这张是初始图；如果他们的调查或搜索成功，你可以切换到下方那张。

当他们开始刷开一些泥土与积雪时，这张会显示长满苔藓的地面。

拉开苔藓 - “地板地形砖”

这块地形砖可以在他们用一次互动拉开苔藓后显示；或者他们在调查中取得初始大成功或大失败，从而会引导他们将其拉开。此地形砖起初是隐藏的，因此需要将其[显示]出来。

如果他们在成功上取得第 3 次推进，那么他们会注意到分隔各区域的金属栅栏，你可以将地形砖切换到下方显示的第二张图片。

这张会显示可能升起的墙与单独的地形砖，希望能给他们足够的信息，明白这是一个谜题锁。

解开谜题

一旦他们解开谜题，你可以描述栅栏墙升起，接着一个金属笼顶在他们上方卷起并锁住他们，将他们困在里面——他们就要下降了！你可以揭示最后这张地形砖图像。为了更容易找到它，使用地形砖的“俯视”按钮（房子图标），即可隔离这块地形砖以取消隐藏。

Guide to Revealing the Discoveries Manually

Note: This puzzle comes fully automated in my premium module including effects, logic tracking and SFX.

When the heroes first approach the area, they may have been Searching or Investigating where tracks left or this "dead end." In the DC Summary, it states when to reveal or switch a tile. You can use the below for reference if that textual DC guide is not sufficient.

Initial Area - "Larger Tile"

This tile has two images, this is the initial one and below is the one you can toggle to if they have a successful Investigate or Search.

This shows the moss covered ground when they start to brush away some of the dirt and snow.

Pulling the Moss Away - "Floor Tile"

This tile can be shown either once they pull moss away with an interact or they had an initial critical success on their investigation, which would have led them to pulling it away. This tile will need to be [shown] as it is initially hidden.

If they get a 3rd progression in success, then they will notice the metal bars separating areas, and you can toggle the tile to the second image shown below.

This one shows the walls that may come up and individual tiles giving them hopefully enough information that this is a puzzle lock.

Solving the Puzzle

Once they solve the puzzle, you can describe the bar walls coming up and then a metal cage top rolling up over them to lock them inside, they are about to descend! You can reveal this last tile image. To easily get to it, use the tile "overhead" button (the house) and you can isolate this tile to unhide it.

GM Overview - What's Included!.name: GM 概览——包含内容！ GM Overview - What's Included!
GM Overview - What's Included!.text:
你好！感谢你下载此模组！这个模组的开发源于我在游玩 Paizo 的《新手入门盒》后产生的热情，以及我在寻找一座通往他们其他冒险的桥梁。为了激发更强的沉浸感，并为 GM 与玩家留出空间去共同留下持久印象，我受此启发制作了能促成这些成果的工具、地图与互动内容。希望你能在它进入的任何游戏中都享受并善用这些内容。

模组内容 - Plus Pack 24.2

此模组包含地图、物品、说明，以及自制与衍生素材。

请查看致谢，并考虑向本次这份中度衍生作品的创作者与开发者进行支持。

素材总计

6 个场景* + 1 个无门版本选项
6 张可用于打印的高质量地图

40 个物品（6 个自制）**

1 张素材地图、1 张标注地图
1 个高质量罗盘叠加图块

15+ 个主动/交互图块

45+ 个预制件，12 个遗珍

1 个谜题，3 个危害，3 个隐藏发现，1 个宏

每个场景的说明

DC 与宝藏摘要

示例叙事，以及物品图片

  • *其中两个场景为过渡性的沉浸场景。

  • **其中有四个角色（陷阱/危害）与 40 个物品确实需要 PF2E。若你使用其他游戏系统，它们将不会下载；但如果你想要它们，请在我的 Discord 联系我，我会想办法把它们提供给你。

  • 注意：此模组可独立使用，但高级版本为互动内容提供完整的自动化与动画。高级版本也需要此版本，并包含额外素材。

场景

此模组包含六个场景，其中四个场景是“地图”。

主题：寻觅

该主题背后的想法是：冒险在寻找线索，以发现某个隐藏军阀行动基地的入口。

  1. 搜索 - 此地图提供一个可供大范围探索的空间，并带有一处俯瞰山脊。它也支援与游荡战团的遭遇：地精、兽人、狗头人，或其他有组织的掠食者。

  2. 地形 - 此地图是一处环境危害。它会生成巨大而险恶的幻象，并配以受折磨的叙事，需要机智才能从中找到出路。

  3. 丘陵山麓 - 此地图提供扎营空间，同时也有可探索的区域，最终以一个谜题收束：如何用定位术找到通往军阀行动基地的“门”。

主题：渗透

  1. 电梯 - 这是一个带叙事的过渡场景（并留有大量空间用于技能检定或其他叙事手段）。它提供沉浸感。

  2. 门前 - 此场景为第一人称视角的过渡场景，呈现一段令人胆寒的下行，进入地城。在最后时刻汇总探索活动，并提供额外的叙事“燃料”。

  3. 地城 - 这个垂直场景是一段迷你“地城爬行”，含九个遭遇房间，并留有额外空间以加入更多内容……并配有陷阱、隐藏发现与密门。

物品

  1. 大多数物品是战利品或工具。

  2. 其中包含一套日志风格的笔记，来自先前的冒险（从未归来者）。它无需 Xbozon 的 Storyteller 模组也可使用，但 Xbozon 的模组能提供很棒的沉浸“氛围”。

  3. 注意：其中有加粗的插入段落，供你作为 GM 填入专有名词/姓名/地点/等等。@UUID[JournalEntry.nNqTO3gg7Pfqqiyr]{Journal: The Faithful words of Thida Aubade}

说明

  • GM Read Me（本文件！）概述了一些关于交互图块、路线图、DC 库、宝藏表，以及一些建议的叙事调整的说明（我会随时间补充）。

  • 运行该谜题的说明

  • 迷你地城的说明概览，包括设计原则

  • 物品图片，以便你与玩家分享。

交互图块

许多地图都带有交互图块。其中一些会在你的角色穿行场景时，使用 TheRipper 的 Levels 自动调整其垂直高度，从而打开新的或不同的视角；但也有一些图块可由 GM 使用 Freeze 的 Multiface Tiles 进行切换。

这些图块会在检定成功或在他们触发陷阱后，将对玩家可见的素材进行替换！其中一些处于“隐藏”状态，需要 GM 将其“取消隐藏”。

注意：在高级版本中，这些预制件均已自动化。

预制件

大多数预制件都以已放置的图块形式包含在内（并可用于其他地图）。在此模组中，它们使玩家在火炬下方或墙体挑檐下方行走时，能够营造出垂直高度。

音效

此模组不包含任何音频文件，但我强烈且唯一推荐 Michaël Ghelfi Studios (MGS) 以及优秀的应用程序 dyscrb。我个人版本的这些模组包含他最高品质的音效，未来的付费版本也可能包含他的素材。

奥塔里之下的麻烦 (TIO)

此模组不需要 Paizo 的内容，但我希望对那些地图提供一个“重制版”，并加入一些额外内容或想法。PF2E 系统是其灵感来源。然而，它也可以作为 Paizo《奥塔里的麻烦》第 3 章的兼容地图套组使用。任何包含的商标、商业外观与创意表达并非必需，并且在不改变本模组的理念、用途或许可的前提下可进行变更。

注意：本产品并非由 Paizo 出版、背书或特别批准。欲了解 Paizo Inc. 与 Paizo 产品的更多信息，请访问 paizo.com，并考虑购买该冒险。

Hello! Thank you for downloading this module! The development of this module grew out of the passion I had after playing Paizo's Beginner Box, and looking for a bridge to some of their other adventures. My aim to inspire more immersion into the game with room for the GM and players to contribute lasting impressions inspired me to create tools, maps, and interactions that would bear those outcomes. I hope you enjoy leveraging them in whatever game they enter.

Module Contents - Plus Pack 24.2

This module contains maps, items, instructions, and custom as well as derivative assets.

Please see the Acknowledgements and consider contributing to the creators and developers of this moderately derivative creation.

Total Assets

6 Scenes* + 1 Door-less options
6 High Quality Maps for Printing

40 Items (6 custom)**

1 Asset Map, 1 Labeled Map
1 High Quality Compass Overlay Tile

15+ Active / Interactive Tiles

45+ PreFabs, 12 Icons

1 puzzle, 3 hazards, 3 hidden discoveries, 1 Macro

Instructions for each Scene

DC and Treasure Summary

Sample Narratives, and Item Images

  • *Two of the scenes are transitional immersions.

  • **There are four Actors (traps/hazards) and 40 Items that do require PF2E. These will not download if you use another game system, but if you'd like them, please contact me in my Discord and I will find a way to get them to you.

  • Note: This module can be used on its own, but the premium version includes full automation and animations for the interactions. The Premium version requires this version as well, but includes additional assets.

Scenes

This module contains six scenes. Four of the scenes are "maps."

Theme: Finding

The idea behind this theme is adventures finding clues to discover the entrance to a hidden warlords base of operations.

  1. The Searching - This map provides a large explorable space with an overlooking ridge. It also supports encounters with roaming warbands of Goblins, Orcs, Kobolds, or other Organized Predators.

  2. The Terrain - This map is an Environmental Hazard. It creates monstrous and menacing illusions with tormented narratives that require wits to navigate out of it.

  3. The Foothills - This map provides a space to camp, but also has areas to explore ending with a puzzle on how to locate the "door" to the warlords base of operations.

Theme: Infiltrating

  1. The Elevator - This is transitional scene with narrative (and plenty of space for skill checks or other narrative devices). It provides immersion.

  2. The Doorstep - This scene is a transitional 1st person view of a daunting decent into the dungeon. A final moment to gather exploration activities and provide additional narrative "juice."

  3. The Dungeon - This vertical scene is a a mini "dungeon-crawl" with nine encounter rooms and additional space to add more… complete with traps, hidden discoveries, and secret doors.

Items

  1. Most of the items are loot or tools.

  2. A journal style set of notes from previous adventures (never returned) is included. It can be used without the Storyteller Module by Xbozon, but Xbozon's module provides a nice immersive "feel."

  3. Note: There are bold insert portions for you as the GM to enter proper nouns/names/places/ect. @UUID[JournalEntry.nNqTO3gg7Pfqqiyr]{Journal: The Faithful words of Thida Aubade}

Instructions

  • GM Read Me (this document!) outlines some instructions on the interactive tiles, a roadmap, DC Library, Treasure Table, and some suggested Narrative Adjustments (I will add to this overtime.)

  • Instructions for running the Puzzle

  • Instructional overview for the mini-dungeon including the design principles

  • Item Images so that you can share with players.

Interactive Tiles

Many of the maps have interactive tiles. Some will simply automatically adjust the vertical height of your actors using Levels by TheRipper as they traverse the scenes opening up new or different views, but some tiles the GM can toggle using Multiface Tiles by Freeze.

These tiles will swap the visible asset to the players after a successful check or after they trigger a trap! Some are in the "hidden" state, and requires the GM to "unhide" them.

Note: In the Premium version all of these PreFabs are automated

PreFabs

Most of the prefabs are included (and can be used in other maps) as placed tiles. In this module, they provide the ability to create vertical height as players walk under torches or wall overhangs.

Sounds

This module contains No audio files, but I highly and solely recommend Michaël Ghelfi Studios (MGS) and the wonderful application dyscrb. My personal version of this modules includes his highest quality sounds and a future paid version may include his assets as well.

Troubles Under Otari (TIO)

This module does not require content from Paizo, but I wanted to provide a "remake" of those maps with some additional content or ideas. The PF2E system was its inspiration. However, while it could be used as a compatible set of maps for Chapter 3 of Troubles in Otari, by Paizo. Any trademarks, trade dress, and creative expressions included are not essential to, and can be varied without altering, the ideas, use, or access to this module.

Note: This product is not published, endorsed, or specifically approved by Paizo. For more information about Paizo Inc. and Paizo products, visit paizo.com and consider purchasing the Adventure.

Encounter Map: The Searching.name: 遭遇地图：搜索 Encounter Map: The Searching
Encounter Map: The Searching.text:
概述

这张地图为60x30，分辨率100dpi。它有三个等级：山脊地面、林线，以及下方的山谷。山脊有两处“悬挑”，提供一个可供“躲藏”的垂直空间，或供英雄在其下方扎营。天气设定为平静，并预计采用傍晚较晚时分的光照。

地图包含墙体，用于分隔部分可能提供较弱或标准掩蔽的岩石，以及林线与从下方森林向上升起的山坡。其中一些墙体带有距离指示器。

熟悉并设置地图

  1. 加载该模组。

  2. 将玩家指示物放置在“backpack”地块上。

  3. 为遭遇添加你想加入的任何敌方生物。我建议将它们添加到地图的“east”侧，让游荡的战团获得“下坡”冲锋，并从高地获得一些优势，或让玩家角色通过躲在岩石后方获得优势。

  4. 地形上的大型岩石提供掩蔽，允许擅长潜行的角色躲藏（敌人亦然），并且/或者可以攀爬到其上。

  5. 山脊上的大多数墙体是基于距离的“窗口”，允许玩家靠近它们、攀爬它们，或从上方观察。

  6. 在枯树之后、位于山脊上的位置，使用 Ripper's Levels 具有一个“step-down”自动化。

  7. 光照设置为日落前2小时，你可以按需调整。

  8. 当他们全部从山脊走下到最底层后，即可将他们切换到下一张地图。

建议

  1. 让玩家先选择一个探索行动作为第一个行动

  2. 将该场景既作为寻找线索的地点，也作为遭遇某个具有攻击性的、游荡的有组织团体的地点，对方可能也在寻找同一个地方

  3. 加入一个投降选项，使其中一名生物能够提供其背景故事，并给出一些提示，说明他们尚未搜查过哪些地方

  4. 在尸体或投降的战团身上加入战利品

  5. 允许玩家找到足迹，显示一条下行的路线，或许还能提供一条额外线索，以发现这个隐藏行动基地的入口

Overview

This map is 60x30 at 100dpi. It has three levels: The ridge ground, the tree line, and the valley below. There are two "overhangs" of the ridge providing a vertical space to "hide" or for the heroes to camp underneath. The weather is set to calm with an expectation of late afternoon lighting.

Walls are included separating out some of the rocks that may provide lesser or standard cover as well as the tree line and the rising hill from the forest below. Some of the walls have a proximity indicator.

Getting familiar with and Setting Up the Map

  1. Load the Module.

  2. Place player tokens on the "backpack" tile.

  3. Add any enemy creatures you wish to add for the encounter. I suggest adding them to the "east" side or the map giving the roaming warband a "downhill" run and some advantages from the high ground or player characters advantages from hiding behind rocks.

  4. Large rocks on the terrain provide cover, allow stealthy character to hide (as well as enemies) and/or climb up on.

  5. Most of the walls on the ridge are proximity based "windows" allowing players to approach them, climb them, or look over them.

  6. There is a "step-down" automation on the ridge just past the dead tree using Ripper's Levels.

  7. Lighting is set to 2 hours before sunset, you can adjust this a you like.

  8. Once they all step down from the ridge to bottom level, then they can be transitioned to the next map.

Suggestions

  1. Have players select an Exploration Activity as the first activity

  2. Use the scene as both a place to find clues but also encounter some aggressive roaming organized group that may be looking for the same place

  3. Include a surrender option where one of the creatures can provide their backstory and some hints as to where they have not looked

  4. Include Loot from the corpses or surrendered warband

  5. Allow the players to find tracks that show a way down or maybe an additional clue to finding the entrance to this hidden base of operations

Release & Roadmap.name: 发布与路线图 Release & Roadmap
Release & Roadmap.text:
Plus Pack

Plus Pack 是我最低档的高级包，包含可直接游玩的不同场景，带有光亮术、墙体、等级，并且还包含可交互的地块。你可以在此处将其加入我的购物车：我的 KoFi 页面：https://ko-fi.com/wisewhun，并且也能获得我 discord 的许可。随着时间推移，将会为进行捐赠或购买高级包的用户添加奖励。

此包的高级版本包含自动化、动画，以及更多预制件。

PLus Pack 24.2 - 增强地图

本模组开箱即用，并附带工具以提供全面的体验。

当前发布

  1. 六个纵向可直接游玩的场景

    1. 搜索

    2. 地形

    3. 山麓

    4. 电梯（过渡场景）

    5. 门阶（过渡场景）

    6. 地下城

  2. 自定义危害/角色

  3. XX 预制件

  4. 纵向移动

  5. 可交互地块（宝箱、谜题、陷阱）

  6. 支持性说明

路线图（又名待办列表）- 值得期待的内容！

这个“路线图”更像是待办列表。它并不旨在描述固定顺序或时间表。

  1. 知识门槛“可直接游玩”（在本次发布的时代提供免费的平面地图

  2. 可用于任何城市的城门区，但也将兼容 PF2E 的奥塔里

其他高级地图将很快提供。请查看我的 Ko-fi 页面、discord 或我的合作伙伴之一。

什么是增强地图？

“增强”地图是一种动态且可交互的场景，可能包含自动化动画、自动化地块触发、多层、海拔、移动、宏等更多内容。其目的在于帮助你作为 GM 为你的玩家带来“惊艳”效果：开箱即用，并支持各个团桌可能喜欢的各种元素。

Plus Pack

The plus pack is my lowest premium pack and includes different scenes ready-to-play with lights, walls, levels, and it also includes interactive tiles. You can add this to your shopping cart at my KoFi Page here: https://ko-fi.com/wisewhun and get access to my discord as well. Overtime, rewards will be added to users who make donations or purchase premium packs.

The Premium version of this pack includes automations, animations, and many more prefabs.

PLus Pack 24.2 - Enhanced Maps

This module comes ready-to-lay with tools providing a comprehensive experience.

Current Release

  1. Six vertical ready-to-play scenes

    1. The Searching

    2. The Terrain

    3. The Foothills

    4. The Elevator (Transitional Scene)

    5. The Doorsetp (Transitional Scene)

    6. The Dungeon

  2. Custom Hazards/Actors

  3. XX PreFabs

  4. Vertical Movement

  5. Interactive Tiles (Chests, Puzzles, Traps)

  6. Supporting Instructions

Roadmap (aka Backlog) - Things to look forward to!

This "roadmap" is more of a backlog. It is not meant to describe set order or a timetable.

  1. Threshold of Knowledge "Ready to Play" (Free flat maps are available at time of this release

  2. A Town Gate District that can be used in any city, but will also be compatible with PF2E's Otari

Other premium maps will be available soon. Check my Ko-fi page, discord or one of my partners.

What is an enhanced Map?

An "enhanced" map is a dynamic and interactive scene which may include automated animations, automated tile triggers, multiple layers, elevations, movement, macros and much more. The intention is to help you as the GM deliver a "wow" factor to your players that is ready to play and supportive of what elements each table may enjoy.

Encounter Map: The Terrain.name: 遭遇地图：地形 Encounter Map: The Terrain
Encounter Map: The Terrain.text:
概览

这张地图为24x26、100dpi的环境危害。它只有一个等级，但有一个俯视图块来提供垂直沉浸感。有两个场景版本：温和的绿色倾斜地形，以及幻象危害。场景应为完全黑暗，但这是魔法黑暗术，会将任何拥有光亮术或[darkvision]者的视距限制在仅15英尺。

玩家可以通过查看他们的笔记、使其失效，或逃离来克服该危害。

这张地图没有墙壁或固定路径，旨在允许根据移动速度自由穿行。

熟悉并设置地图

  1. 加载该模块。

  2. 将玩家指示物放在“backpack”图块上。

  3. “backpack”图块所在的2x24区域为非危害区域。

  4. 该危害为24x24，并以一个Actor的形式包含；作为GM，你可以将地图图块切换为Menacing Monstrous Terrain，并“取消隐藏”俯视图块。

  5. 当玩家踏入危害后，将他们的视距改为15英尺，并为其添加以下效果： @UUID[Item.cURG80Z5uDlYQ6j2]{Sense suppression}。

  6. Premium版本中包含一些建议叙事，你可以在玩家回合中或在开始时使用。

  7. 出口位于场景的右上角。一旦他们进入此处即可过渡到下一张地图，并恢复其正常视距。

建议

  1. 让玩家将一次探索行动选为第一个行动

  2. 将该场景作为一次遭遇来分享更多背景或提供以不同方式克服挑战的见解。

  3. 允许玩家找到足迹或回忆线索以了解如何克服它

  4. 如果你想让它成为一次濒死体验，当他们进入24x24周边上任何一个非出口图块的空间时，你可以将指示物传送回地图中心。

Overview

This map is 24x26 at 100dpi environmental hazard. It has one level, but has an overhead tile to provide vertical immersion. There are two scene versions: The gentle green slopping terrain, and the illusionary hazard. The scene should be full darkness, but it is a magical darkness limiting anyone with light or [darkvision] to only 15 feet.

The players can overcome the hazard by looking at their notes, by disabling it, or by fleeing.

There are no walls or set paths for this map, it is meant to allow free traversing relative to movement speed.

Getting familiar with and Setting Up the Map

  1. Load the Module.

  2. Place player tokens on the "backpack" tile.

  3. The 2x24 section where the backpack" tile resides is the non-hazard zone.

  4. The hazard is 24x24 and is included as an Actor, and as the GM you can switch the map tile to the Menacing Monstrous Terrain and "unhide" the overhead tiles.

  5. Once players step into the hazard change their vision to 15 feet and add the following effect to them: @UUID[Item.cURG80Z5uDlYQ6j2]{Sense suppression}.

  6. There are some suggested narratives included in the Premium version that you can use during a players turn or at the start.

  7. The exit is the top right corner of the scene. Once they enter this they can transition to the next map, and regain their normal vision.

Suggestions

  1. Have players select an Exploration Activity as the first activity

  2. Use the scene as an encounter to share more lore or provide insights into overcoming challenges in different ways.

  3. Allow the players to find tracks or recall clues on how to overcome it

  4. If you want to make it a near death experience, you can teleport the tokens back to the center of the map if they enter a space on any of the 24x24 permiter that is not the Exit Tile.

Encounter Map: The Foothills.name: 遭遇地图：山麓 Encounter Map: The Foothills
Encounter Map: The Foothills.text:
概述

这张地图为 60x30，分辨率 100dpi。它只有一个等级，但包含数个顶部图块以提供垂直沉浸感。在区域尽头有一扇谜题门（升降机），需要被发现。该谜题由三组多面图块组成，你可以在搜寻或察觉检定成功后将其“取消隐藏”并进行切换/改变。另有一个树桩，旁边有一个被遗弃的背包，里面有一件魔法物品，可能为解谜提供帮助

玩家可以通过查看笔记、将其解除、或逃离来克服该谜题。

有一些刻意设计的区域，玩家可以现在使用，或在他们下到地城后作为扎营与休息的地点在之后撤退到此。

熟悉并设置地图

  1. 加载该模组。

  2. 在此查看运行该谜题的说明：@UUID[JournalEntry.EkgkAGlVbTSMLfXz]{运行谜题}

  3. 将玩家指示物放在“背包”图块上。

  4. 任何选择基于搜寻或察觉的行动的玩家，都可以定位术足迹、带着被遗弃背包的树桩，或谜题门。

  5. 有很多能扎营的地方，并且有相当不错的掩蔽。

  6. 树桩旁有一个被遗弃的 @UUID[Item.2ATycei4CT8uXorg]{背包}，其中有一些黑暗视觉药水以及一个 @UUID[Item.SvvXNgTAnUy0B0Ly]{黄铁矿老鼠}，以防他们想让老鼠测试谜题或需要第 5 个

  7. 一旦有玩家在指定的谜题区域内成功通过一次检定：

    • 第一次检定：将地形图块切换为被“污秽”覆盖的区域。

    • 第二次检定或行动：当他们将其清理掉后，“取消隐藏”并显示地面。

    • 第三次检定：并且当他们成功仔细观察后，将图块切换为方形砖块。

  8. 在此查看关于如何运行该谜题的详细日志笔记 @UUID[JournalEntry.EkgkAGlVbTSMLfXz]{运行谜题}，并鼓励进行不同的技能检定以获得线索，同时在他们犯错时提供不同的效果。

  9. 一旦它被解开，就“取消隐藏”最后一块图块，向他们展示自己被锁在笼子里。

暗示术

  1. 让玩家将探索行动选为第一个行动

  2. 玩家在上一幕之后可能需要一次休息，但也许有一些较小的生物正在进出他们可以跟随/胁迫的行动基地，或者甚至需要对其进行自卫。

  3. 允许玩家找到足迹或回忆如何克服谜题的线索，这样它就不只是一次“元游戏”练习。

Overview

This map is 60x30 at 100dpi. It has one level, but has several overhead tiles to provide vertical immersion. There is a puzzle door (elevator) at the end of the area that will need to be discovered. The puzzle is three sets a multi-face tile that you can "unhide" and alter as Seek or Perception checks are successful. There is also a tree stump with an abandoned backpack that has a magical item in it that could provide assistance with the puzzle

The players can overcome the puzzle by looking at their notes, by disabling it, or by fleeing.

There are intentional areas that the players can either use now or retreat to later if they descend the dungeon as a place to camp and rest.

Getting familiar with and Setting Up the Map

  1. Load the Module.

  2. Review the instructions for running the puzzle here: @UUID[JournalEntry.EkgkAGlVbTSMLfXz]{Running the Puzzle}

  3. Place player tokens on the "backpack" tile.

  4. Any player that chooses a Seek or Perception based Activity can locate tracks, the stump with the abandoned pack, or the puzzle door.

  5. There are plenty of places to camp with decent cover.

  6. The tree-stump has an abandoned @UUID[Item.2ATycei4CT8uXorg]{Backpack} which has some darkvision potions and a @UUID[Item.SvvXNgTAnUy0B0Ly]{Pyrite Rat} in case they want the rat to test the puzzle or need a 5th

  7. Once a player has a successful check in the designated puzzle area:

    • First Check: Toggle the Terrain tile to a "filth" covered area.

    • Second Check or Action: Once they clear it away, "unhide" and show the floor.

    • Third Check: and once they look closely successfully, toggle the tile to the square tiles.

  8. See the detail journal notes on running the puzzle here @UUID[JournalEntry.EkgkAGlVbTSMLfXz]{Running the Puzzle}, and encourage different skill checks to get clues as well as provide different effects when they make mistakes.

  9. Once it is solved, then "unhide" the last tile, showing them locked in the cage.

Suggestions

  1. Have players select an Exploration Activity as the first activity

  2. The players may need a rest after the last scene, but perhaps some smaller creatures are coming/going into the base of operations they could follow/coerce or may even need to defend themselves against.

  3. Allow the players to find tracks or recall clues on how to overcome the puzzle so that it is not just a "meta-game" exercise.

Encounter Map: The Elevator.name: 遭遇地图：电梯 Encounter Map: The Elevator
Encounter Map: The Elevator.text:
概览

这张竖版地图为 10x110，分辨率为 100dpi。它只有一个等级，但包含若干顶部叠加地砖以提供更强的深度沉浸感。本场景旨在提供一种沉入该地城的沉浸式感受。场景中有一个指示物（token），可让你将 向下的升降机 移动。

熟悉并设置地图

  1. 加载模组与场景。

  2. 将场景配置为“权限”[所有玩家]。这可以避免你需要把指示物（token）放入场景中，但边界框仍会强制他们的缩放与视角限制在有限区域内（前提是你已启用“锁定视角”）。我建议在玩家从上一张地图解开谜题之前不要调整权限，以免剧透。

  3. 找到用于控制升降机的控制指示物（左上角，在地砖之外），然后你可以点击使其向下，从而手动让升降机下降（这是一个在我的 Premium Pack 中已自动化的区域示例）。

  4. 阅读叙事文本

控制指示物示意图

注意： 此场景没有等级，因为它使用的都是顶部叠加地砖；因此如果你把一个指示物（token）拖放到其上，角色将显示在笼墙之上。

建议

  1. 鼓励角色扮演

Overview

This vertical map is 10x110 at 100dpi. It has one level, but has several overhead tiles to provide depth immersion. The scene is to provide an immerse sense of descending into this dungeon. There is a token that will allow you to move the elevator down.

Getting familiar with and Setting Up the Map

  1. Load the Module and Scene.

  2. Configure the Scene to "Permission" [All Players]. This prevents you needing to place the tokens into the scene, but the bounding box will still force their zoom and view to the limited area (as long as you did activate "Lock View"). I suggest not adjusting permissions until the players have unlocked the puzzle from previous map so as not to spoil it.

  3. Find the control token for the elevator (top left outside the tile) and you can click it down to make the elevator manually descend (this is an example of an area that is automated in my Premium Pack).

  4. Read the narrative

Diagram of Control Token

Note: There are no levels on this scene as it uses all overhead tile so if you do drop a token onto it, the actor will show on top of the cage wall.

Suggestions

  1. Encourage role play

Encounter Map: The Doorstep.name: 遭遇地图：门阶 Encounter Map: The Doorstep
Encounter Map: The Doorstep.text:
概述

这张纵向地图为30x30，100dpi，用于展示笼门开启以及其前方短走廊向下延伸的强制透视效果。它带有边界框以防止滚动或缩放。该场景旨在提供一种沉浸式的抵达地城的感觉。

熟悉并设置地图

  1. 加载模组与场景。

  2. 将指示物放在缩放视野底部之外的位置。这样你就可以用他们的指示物来观察，同时也能看到为边缘提供漂亮收边的墙体。

  3. 让每位玩家选择一项探索行动

  4. 设置音乐

  5. 阅读任何额外的叙述

建议

  1. 或许可以在每个团期进入地城后，将该场景设置为着陆页。

Overview

This vertical map is30x30 at 100dpi to show a forced perspective of the cage door opening and the short hallway in front of them descending. It has a bounding box to prevent scrolling or zoom. The scene is to provide an immerse sense of arriving at the dungeon.

Getting familiar with and Setting Up the Map

  1. Load the Module and Scene.

  2. Place the tokens just at the bottom out of the zoom. This will allow you to use their tokens to see and the walls that are providing a nice trim to the edges.

  3. Have each player choose an Exploration Activity

  4. Set the music

  5. Read any additional narrative

Suggestions

  1. Perhaps set this scene as the Landing Page once inside the dungeon for each play session.

Encounter Map: The Dungeon.name: 遭遇地图：地城 Encounter Map: The Dungeon
Encounter Map: The Dungeon.text:
概览

这张三层地图在 100dpi 下为 35x50。它包含九个遭遇房间以及另外 2 个用于探索的房间。布满陷阱、危害与暗门，你可以按需加入自定义遭遇或怪物。

向下的坡道会将玩家指示物下调 -10 尺；如果他们再次前往电梯，则会把他们调回 +10 尺。同样，楼梯会将他们上调 +20 尺到主层；若他们折返穿行，则会把他们下调 -20 尺回到地城。

熟悉并设置地图

  1. 加载模组与场景。

  2. @UUID[Actor.QfVFWcFE8JME4TlX]{烈焰牢笼} 危害 Actor 已在场景中并设置为隐藏（保持这样，因为它仅用于 XP 与战斗追踪器；GM 可切换多面 Tile 来显示火焰喷射）。

  3. 逐一查看各个可切换 tile：喷火器、喷火器门笼、牢房箱子、拟形怪、石像鬼、精灵锁箱、小箱子、毛皮堆 1、毛皮堆 2、干草堆。

  4. **精灵锁箱应当是隐藏物品；我将其设为未隐藏以便更容易看到，请切换为隐藏。**

  5. 检查暗门——如果玩家使用它，考虑通过让他们出其不意地接近 Boss、或在潜行进出时给予优势、或让他们找到太阳轮遗物并在遭遇中使用来奖励他们。你打算如何揭示这扇门？它是幻象吗？是否有一个隐蔽的静音门闩？

  6. 有些墙会阻挡移动但允许视线，这是为了帮助营造垂直等距视角的沉浸感。

  7. 将指示物放在起始 tile 上（在电梯格栅上可能不太好看见）— 重要：打开 Levels UI 并确保你选择了“Elevator”，这样当你把玩家指示物放上去时，他们会在正确的等级上。

  8. 激活场景

  9. 让每位玩家选择一个探索行动

  10. 如果有东西出错，你随时可以在指示物配置中调整玩家指示物的高度。若/当他们攀爬任何东西时，你需要手动设置他们的高度。

建议

  1. 当他们扎营时混合调整遭遇

  2. 提供投降选项或让他们获得更多前方信息的方法

  3. 变化各个遭遇房间的难度或呈现的挑战

  4. 将其用于 Paizo 的《奥塔里的麻烦》第 3 章

Overview

This three-level map is 35x50 at 100dpi. It has nine encounter rooms and 2 additional rooms for exploration. Laced with traps, hazards and secret doors, add custom encounters or monsters as you choose.

The ramp down will adjust player tokens down -10 feet, and will be adjust them back up +10 feet if they head to elevator again. Likewise the Stairs will bring them up +20 feet to the main floor or back down -20 feet to the dungeon if they traverse back.

Getting familiar with and Setting Up the Map

  1. Load the Module and Scene.

  2. The @UUID[Actor.QfVFWcFE8JME4TlX]{Cage of Flame} Hazard Actor is on the scene and set to hidden (leave it this way as it is present only for XP and combat tracker, the Multi-face Tile can be toggled by the GM to show flame spurts.

  3. Look over each of the Toggle-tiles: The Flamethrower, The Flamethrower Door Cage, The Cells Chest, The Mimic, The Gargoyle, The Elven Lockbox, The Small Chest, Fur Pile 1, Fur Pile 2, Hay Pile.

  4. **The Eleven Lockbox is supposed to be a hidden item, I left it unhid so it was easier to see, toggle to hidden.**

  5. Review the Secret Door - if players use this, consider rewarding them by catching boss off guard or given them an advantage if the sneak in and out, or find the Sun Wheel Artifact and use it in the Encounter. Consider how you want to reveal this door? Is it an illusion? Is there a secret quiet latch?

  6. Some walls block movement but allow sight, this is to help with the vertical isometric immersion.

  7. Place the tokens on the started tile (it may be hard to see on the elevator grate) - IMPORTANT: Open up the Levels UI and ensure you have "Elevator" selected so when you drop player tokens on it, they are on the correct level.

  8. Activate Scene

  9. Have each player choose an Exploration Activity

  10. You can always adjust player token elevation in the token configuration if something tweeks. You will need to manually set their elevation if/when they ever climb something.

Suggestions

  1. Mix up Encounters as they camp

  2. Have surrender options or ways for them to get more details of what is ahead

  3. Vary the encounter room difficulties or presented challenges

  4. Use this for Chapter 3 Troubles in Otari by Paizo

DC Library.name: DC 图书馆 DC Library
DC Library.text:
DC Approach

In my games, I use one of two approaches. I either have a roll result spread from Critical Success to Critical Failure or I have variable levels of success, with lower DCs providing less or possibly incorrect information. I make a ton of use out of Recall Knowledge, and the Remaster RAW is how I have always homebrewed it, which means Critical Success/Failure = 2 pieces of information they want to know plus basic, and Success/Failure = 1 piece of information (naturally with failures being incorrect information). The below is meant to be a guide, use or adjust them as helpful.

Theme - Finding

This is for Set 1 Scenes.

Recall Knowledge Checks can be adjusted by applicable category lore or applicable specific lore as well as adjusting number of attempts. Remember to increase DC with each attempt up to the max allowed. I have not included any specifics here, but encourage this reminder to the players and point you to my guide above.

Scene - The Searching

A Tool - @Check[type:investigate|dc:19]

  • Adventurers were given a faithful copy of notes that the previous hero party sent back iteratively. It was copied into a book with useful information.
  • @UUID[JournalEntry.nNqTO3gg7Pfqqiyr]{Journal: The Faithful words of Thida Aubade}
  • Item Bonus: +2 to their [Aid] action
  • Activity Duration: 10 Min in Exploration or 1 Action during Encounter.
  • Using this tool provides an Item Bonus to Checks as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{Aid} either as an Exploration Activity to help another party member's Exploration Activity or a single @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]{Interact} action during an encounter to Aid.

Finding the Way - @Check[type:survival|dc:19]

  • Players set out from origin to destination that is approximately 6 hours but it requires some navigation off roads with vague hints from a journal or the quest giver.
  • Circumstance Bonus: -2 if no compass
  • Item Bonus: +2 if using the "Journal" as Exploration Activity
  • Activity Duration: 6 hours
  • Critical Success: Find it faster - save 2 hours
  • Success: Do not get lost
  • Failure: Find it slower - lose 1 hour
  • Critical Failure: Find it slower - lose 2 hours and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}

A Captive - @Check[type:coerce|dc:18]

  • If there is a surrender scenario, and the heroes wish to press for information. New check for an additional duration.
  • Circumstance Bonus: Variable to tactics
  • Activity Duration: 10 Min in Exploration
  • Critical Success: 4 questions
  • Success: 2 questions
  • Failure: 1 questions
  • Critical Failure: 2 questions, but lies

Searching the Area - @Check[type:search]

  • Adventurers may want to search area of tracks, signs, or a safe place to camp or how to descend the ridge.
  • Item Bonus: +2 with Journal
  • Activity Duration: 10 Min in Exploration
  • DC22: Find very well cleaned up signs of a former campsite of previous adventurers
  • DC19: Find tracks of a single creature in the dungeon and other types of tracks
  • DC17 Find both overhangs with a small inlet cave to camp and easy way to get down ridge
  • DC15: Find coin on warband

Scene - The Terrain

A Trap - @Check[type:stealth|dc:26]

  • A hero who is in a more alert Exploration Activity has an opportunity to notice the environmental hazard. (Must have the proficiency and skills listed to notice it.)
  • @UUID[Actor.oDbN7khTQTvSXuSS]{Menacing Monstrous Terrain}
  • Item Bonus: +2 if a hero selected the Journal as Exploration Activity
  • Activity Duration: 10 Min in Exploration
  • Critical Success: Also anticipates the routine
  • Success: Notice Hazard, knows everything in description
  • Failure: Notices nothing
  • Critical Failure: Senses something and encourages all party members to spread out and step forward in different areas

Finding the Way - @Check[type:survival|dc:22]

  • The foothills can be seen in the distance, but is the path over the rolling hills that clear?
  • Circumstance Bonus: -2 if no compass
  • Item Bonus: +2 if using the "Journal" as Exploration Activity
  • Activity Duration: 10 Min
  • Critical Success: head to northeast corner
  • Success: +5 Movement speed
  • Failure: No clear insights, any direction is fine.
  • Critical Failure: Believes party should head to the east or west versus northeast

A Recollection - @Check[type:recallknowledge|dc:19]

  • A hero wants to recall anything about Environmental Hazards or this specific illusion to figure out a way to overcome it.
  • Three progressions will result in recalling the solution.
  • Item Bonus: +2 using Journal
  • Activity Duration: 1 Action or 10 minutes
  • Critical Success: 2 Progressions, and All religious symbols of Lamashtu are depicted with three-eyes, this may be a clue to passing through
  • Success: 1 Progression, and Sanctified spaces of Lamashtu are likely to have hazards in the form of environmental, magical or mechanical traps (especially if they will bring about physical or mental disformatity)
  • Failure: 0 Progression
  • Critical Failure: One of Lamashtu's weaknesses is creatures that are stealthy and subtle

Searching the Area - @Check[type:Track|dc:22]

  • If attempting to follow discovered tracks from earlier or if they did a search and found some.
  • Circumstance Bonus: +2 if they found some prior to entering the hazard or have Focused Tracker.
  • Activity Duration: 10 Min in Exploration
  • Critical Success: @UUID[Item.JuaTn5MawptTDuyH]{Focused Tracker}
  • Success: find trail leading to the NE
  • Failure: Lose Trail
  • Critical Failure: Tracks seem to go East or West

Magical Aura - @Check[type:identifymagic|dc:22]

  • A hero who used Detect Magic or Read Aura during Exploration may want to identify the magic of the area/trap.
  • Increasing difficulty as same as a Recall Knowledge repeated attempts
  • Item Bonus: +2 using Journal
  • Activity Duration: 10 minutes
  • Critical Success: Hazard is Magical, Complex, Trap, Description and 2 category of player choice (if the spellslot is 3+ for Read Aura, then they know it is illusionary
  • Success: 1 Magical, Complex, Trap, Description and 1 category
  • Failure: You cannot decipher anything
  • Critical Failure: Hazard is Disabled by spending three stride actions per turn, two straightforward and one back (the three-eyes)

Disrupt it! - See Disable Entry @UUID[Actor.oDbN7khTQTvSXuSS]{Menacing Monstrous Terrain}

  • Temporarily disrupt the magic with either three progression succession using Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion
  • Circumstance Bonus: +2 using Journal
  • Activity Duration: Two Actions
  • Critical Success: 2 Progression
  • Success: 1 Progression
  • Failure: 0 Progression
  • Critical Failure: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}

Scene - The Foothills

Let it Snow - @Check[type:search]

  • A hero who wants to look around depending on the description can use Perception, Nature, or Survival.
  • Bonus: None
  • Activity Duration: 10 Min in Exploration
  • DC25: Weather, good places to camp, find in a stump and tracks with @UUID[Item.JuaTn5MawptTDuyH]{Focused Tracker}
  • DC19: Weather, good places to camp, find @UUID[Item.2ATycei4CT8uXorg]{Backpack} in a stump
  • DC15: Weather, find @UUID[Item.2ATycei4CT8uXorg]{Backpack} in a stump
  • DC9: You see something large moving in the snow drift like a giant worm

A Dead End - @Check[type:investigate|dc:19]

  • If a hero wants to look closer around the "dead end" and where the tracks have led, but prior to uncovering the elevator floor.
  • Item Bonus: +2 if using the "Journal" as Exploration Activity
  • Activity Duration: 10 Min
  • Critical Success: Advance the larger tile to second tile, then show the floor tile (click unhide) and then after a moment switch to the second tile. [They "notice the moss is artificially placed over the area obscuring a tiled area with footprints all over the area like a dance.
  • The tiles have larger lines around certain sections that seems to have recessed steel between them."]
  • Success: Switch larger tile to second tile. [They "notice the tracks have led to a thin mossy area blanketing the cold rock."] If they Interact with the Moss, then show the floor tile (1st tile).
  • Any additional success will provide the critical success above.
  • Failure: You notice tracks come here, but do not notice anything particular, a dead end!
  • Critical Failure: You lose interest and cannot try this activity again for 1 hour

A Recollection - @Check[type:recallknowledge|dc:19]

  • A hero wants to recall anything about the "Test" or "Lamashtu's trials"
  • Item Bonus: +2 using Journal
  • Activity Duration: 1 Action or 10 minutes
  • Critical Success: Lamashtu trials often require five creatures
  • Success: Lamashtu trials are methods to pass closer to her temples
  • Failure: You cannot think of anything useful
  • Critical Failure: This place is an illusion and you passionately persuade people to climb this impassable cliff!

Footprints - @Check[type:Track|dc:18]

  • If attempting to follow discovered tracks from earlier or if they did a search and found some.
  • Circumstance Bonus: +2 if they found some in hazard or have Focused Tracker.
  • Activity Duration: 10 Min in Exploration
  • Critical Success: where the footprints lead to the (puzzle area) @UUID[Item.JuaTn5MawptTDuyH]{Focused Tracker}
  • Success: find trail leading to the E
  • Failure: Lose Trail for hour
  • Critical Failure: You lose trail and in anxiety you stepped all over the footprints and tracks you had found, unable to try again

Think Think Think - @Check[type:investigate]

  • A hero who wants to spend time looking at the puzzle and assessing ideas from past can get clues to figure out the puzzle/riddle.
  • Each attempt increases in difficulty, but a critical on any of them provides the next two clues.
  • Bonus: +2 using Journal
  • Activity Duration: 10 minutes

  • First Attempt (DC20): Notice tiled area under the moss with a script above it translated "The Five Beast Lock" - This is a dynamic puzzle lock, it activates condition curses with incorrect guesses (a guess is stepping on the wrong tile in the wrong order)

  • Second Attempt (DC22): Sequence may matter a little but usually these more have to do with correct combinations (placements).

  • Third Attempt (DC25): Once solved by having Five Creatures stand on correct tile, the entire cages will close revealing a way to the temple

  • Fourth Attempt (DC30): Notice obscure runes on the tiles and some are different than others. Five are different (they correspond to the correct tiles)

  • Fifth Attempt (DC32): Read the runes - Might, Trickery, Nightmares, Change, Family (unique ones), the other ones all say "Aberrance" (Trained in Religion, also tells them these are the domains of Lamashtu

  • Sixth Attempt (DC35): Give hint of best order or which tile to stand on next or how to progress if they are stuck

Shortcut - @Check[type:thievery|dc:20]

  • A hero who wants to simple try to disable it, needs to locate te "Alpha" tile and stand on it while using @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable a Device}
  • They will need three progressions. If obtained, then reveal last cage top tile (you can allow everyone else to dart into it as they see cage closing around the area)
  • Bonus: none
  • Activity Duration: 10 minutes or two actions
  • Critical Success: 2 Progression
  • Success: 1 Progression
  • Failure: 0 Progression
  • Critical Failure: Each Critical Failure breaks a lock pick, but also produces the puzzle effects as described in the puzzle details.

Theme - Infiltrating

This is for Set 2 Scene - The Dungeon.

Recall Knowledge Checks can be adjusted by applicable category lore or applicable specific lore as well as adjusting number of attempts. Remember to increase DC with each attempt up to the max allowed. I have not included any specifics here, but encourage this reminder to the players and point you to my guide above.

Scene - The Elevator (B00) & Hallway (B01)

Uncaged - @Check[type:investigate|dc:19]

  • While no other clues about the inside of dungeon is known, there was one element that was shared and could be recalled, which is a password that some creatures may respond to.
  • Item Bonus: +2 to their action with journal
  • Activity Duration: 10 Min in Exploration
  • One particular that could be learned is the password or motto: "The three-eyed gaze sees you." If the Heroes attempt to use this prior to attacking any creature within, some will send for the boss, others will let them proceed, and some may feign a handshake only to grab them and take them off to the boss.

Dwellers? - @Check[type:Track]

  • Players can look for footprints and even identify them in hopes it may give them some advantage of who dwells here.
  • Bonus: None
  • Activity Duration: 10 Minutes
  • DC20: Four Creatures and their direction down various halls
  • DC19: Three Creatures and their direction down various halls
  • DC18: Two Creatures and their direction down various halls
  • DC16: One Creature and their direction down various halls

Been here/Done That - @Check[type:recall knowledge|dc:18]

  • If there is a skill a hero has about Dungeon Lore, or cults, or related, then they could gather additional insights into how these Temples work. Below you will see recommendations on providing other insights or tips for each narrative as heroes enter a room.
  • Item Bonus: +2 Journal
  • Activity Duration: 10 Min in Exploration
  • Critical Success: Success plus likely had traps or secret doors and get 2 additional insights in each room
  • Success: The signs date this dungeon in the distant past, and cultist likely wont aid each other, but will fiercely defend each other. The hero recognizes scorched burns from fires on the walls.
  • Failure: Cultist do not care for each other
  • Critical Failure: These old dungeons existed before mechanical traps and cultist are fiercely loyal and can usually be coerced if they feel like the other cultists are threatened

Searching the Area - @Check[type:search|dc:23]

  • Adventurers may want to search area of tracks, signs, or a safe place to camp or how to descend the ridge.
  • Bonus: None
  • Activity Duration: 10 Min in Exploration
  • Critical Success: Notice Control Panel for trap once down in hallway
  • Success: Notice Trap
  • Failure: Notice Tracks and elevator controls
  • Critical Failure: Here someone screaming "help!"

Trixie - Discovering, Disabling, Destroying

  • Heroes can discover the trap, disable it or disable the control panel or destroy the trap or a gate.
  • @UUID[Actor.QfVFWcFE8JME4TlX]{Cage of Flame}
  • Bonus: None
  • Activity Duration: Normal
  • AC25: Hit a Nozzle
  • DC25: Force Open
  • DC25: Disable Control Panel - two success progressions
  • DC23: Spot Trap
  • DC21: Pick a Door Lock
  • D20: Disable a Nozzle - two success progressions

Learned - @Check[type:recallknowledge]

  • If a hero wants to investigate the trap or recall anything about it.
  • Thievery or Crafting
  • Bonus: None
  • Activity Duration: 10 Min in Exploration or 1 Action

  • First Attempt (DC20): Immunity, Weakness, Resistance, known crafters, and Traits

    Second Attempt (DC22): Immunity, Weakness, Resistance, known crafters, Traits, and ways to disable.

  • Third Attempt (DC25): Immunity, Weakness, Resistance, known crafters, Routine, Traits, and ways to disable.

Encounter & Treasure.name: 遭遇 & 宝藏 Encounter & Treasure
Encounter & Treasure.text:
遭遇与宝藏思路

在我的游戏中，我会同时设计探索与遭遇，以便带来更多角色扮演并让角色鲜活起来。这也启发我去制作纵向沉浸式场景。下面是对这组场景的一些建议，并且通常与《奥塔里的麻烦》第3章（例如：等级4奖励）兼容。

我通常会加入额外战利品，以防有玩家中途加入，或英雄做了非常符合其教义或禁忌的事（例如：归还某物、让结局变得更复杂、或把投降的敌人转化为被中立化的盟友），或者有时只是因为好奇。很多时候，这可以简单到给一个英雄点，但也可能是更长期的奖励：一件有趣的战利品、对接下来遭遇有帮助的宝藏，或指向长期目标的线索。

当我考虑遭遇难度时，我会关注节奏，并且通常喜欢让英雄保持紧张感：对愚蠢错误进行惩罚，或对冒险与策略性玩法进行奖励。有时，我会把某个生物调整为精英（比如氏族首领之类的，如果队伍推进得可能太快）。

最后，我会把金币拆分成一些有趣的形式（有时是宝石，有时只是各种钱币），但在这里我提供的是净额，给你选择的空间。我不会把尸体上的道具计入宝藏总额。

Encounter & Treasure Approach

In my games, I design both the Exploration and Encounters allowing for more role-play and characters to come to life. This is what inspired me to create vertical an immersive scenes. The below are some suggestions for this set of scenes and has general compatibility for Troubles in Otari Chapter 3 (e.g., level 4 rewards).

I usually include extra loot in case a player joins or the heroes do something really aligned with their edicts or anathemas (e.g., return something, complicate an outcome, or turn a surrendered enemy into a neutralized ally) or sometimes just being curious. Often this can be as simple as a Hero Point, but it can also be more long term rewarding with a nice piece of interesting loot, helpful treasure for the encounters ahead or a clue to a long term goal.

When I consider encounter difficulty, I think about the flow, and generally like to keep the heroes on their toes, punishing them for silly errors or rewarding them for risks or strategic play. Sometimes, I may flip a creature to Elite (like a clan boss or such if the party is perhaps overcoming to quickly).

Finally, I break Gold up into interesting pieces (sometimes gems, and sometimes just various coins), but here I provide the net amount to give you the option. I do not count corpse gear into the treasure totals.

本产品中的保留材料要素包括但不限于：奥塔里、Dawnflower、Lamashtu、Sun Wheel、Thida、Vuzi、寇托斯、艾巴萨罗姆均有所提及，但并非必需，并且可为任何战役进行变更或改动。尽管场景与奖励与《奥塔里的麻烦》的剧情兼容，但并非本产品所必需。

明确指定的已许可材料

theRipper93

Tagger 作者：wasp

虽然我使用了他许多模组，但本模组不依赖其中任何一个。然而，它将成为未来发布的其他模组的依赖项。这个模组支撑着我创建的每一项资产。Tagger 的工作让 MATTs 成为可能，但更重要的是，它简化了加载并提升性能。支持 Wasp！

一个可游玩的场景与一个过渡场景使用了 Lockview 来控制玩家缩放与平移。没有它也能运行，但 Lockview 提供了沉浸感。

此处的遗珍要么来自创作者、要么为创作者作品的衍生、要么为独特内容、或为 FVTT Core 原生内容。创作者与衍生作品基于作者 Lorc、Skoll 与 Delapouite 的内容，并采用 CC 4.0 DEED。

The Dawnflower Champions.name: 黎明花冠军 The Dawnflower Champions
The Dawnflower Champions.text:
这本日志包含了高贵、勇敢而真实的晨花勇士最后幸存通信者的公正且忠实的抄本。晨花图书馆的萨伦瑞特信徒以及所有圣信仰的追随者都怀着深情追忆他们，并希望他们沐浴在太阳永恒的光辉之中。

[在此插入你最喜欢的、那些再也未归来的前英雄的图片。]

This journal contains the fair and faithful copies of the last surviving correspondents of the noble, courageous, and true Dawnflower Champions. The Sarenites of the Dawnflower Library and all followers of the Holy faith hold them in fond memory and hope of their eternal ray of the sun.

[Insert your favorite image her of the former heroes who never returned.]

Entry 1: Setting Out.name: 条目 1：启程 Entry 1: Setting Out
Entry 1: Setting Out.text:
4723年拉玛山月29日

高阶女祭司阁下：

我们根据先前对传闻的讨论——那些传闻主要来自艾巴萨罗姆西北方的腹地——从奥塔里出发向东北行进。经过一整天的跋涉与搜寻后我们扎营；根据我们收集到的一些情报，我们将从当前位置继续向更西北方推进。

我们截获了几名游牧迁徙者，以及一些半人马部族。所有人都一致提到两点：其一，这片区域里的怪物数量异常之多；其二，令人瞠目的、毫无征兆的残暴暴力与骚乱行为不断发生。

最令人不安的一份报告来自几户幸存的家庭。他们在一次攻击摧毁了他们的小村庄后，正迁往艾巴萨罗姆。一个可怜的妻子带着仅存的两个孩子说，她的丈夫某天夜里出去到井边打些新水来洗澡，回来时却说他听见了充满警告与恐惧的低语。在洗澡水还没烧开前，他就开始变得狂躁，并执拗地坚持所有人都必须离开。她说他开始敲响村里的钟，挨家挨户奔走，朝镇上大喊让大家逃命；这引发了巨大的骚动，人们愈发担忧、过度紧张，继而开始收拾家当，往树林与荒野里逃去。似乎正是在那混乱与那番鼓动之下，许多人一开始逃跑，便在黑暗的林中被野兽与暴戾的生物逐个猎杀。村庄很快被洗劫。她几乎难以说清，只断断续续听出“他清醒过来、看见自己做了什么之后，就把自己投进了井里。”整座村子除她与另外几名设法躲藏的人外，全都被杀害；当村民在这场虚假的魔法警报中逃离村子时，他们侥幸活了下来。

我们路过的另一个小村庄传来的报告更为骇人。他们仍在焚烧那些被肢解的死者。故事说，他们小镇的牧师、当地的医师，以及一名本地的纹身师似乎

29, Lamashan 4723

High Priestess,

We headed northeast out of Otari based on our discussions of the rumors mostly coming in the Hinterlands northwest of Absalom. We made camp after a full day hike and search, we will head more northwest of our current location based on some information we have collected.

We intercepted a couple nomadic migrants as well as some centaur tribes. All of them communicating consistently with first an unusual number of monsters in the area paired secondly with dumbfounding spontaneous acts of heinous violence and mayhem.

One report most disturbing came from a few remaining families that were relocating to Absalom after an attack devastated their small village. One poor wife with two remaining children reported her husband went out one night to the well to get some fresh water for the bath and returned stating he had heard whispers of warning and dread. Before the bath water was boiled, he started to become manic and insistent that everyone had to leave. She reported he started ringing the village bell running from house to house yelling to the town to flee and it created such a stir that people grew worried and overanxious and in turn started packing their lives to head to the woods and wild. It seemed in the chaos and through that evocation that as soon as many started to flee, they were picked off by wild beasts and violent creatures in the dark woods. The village was soon sacked. She could hardly make out the words "he through himself into the well when he came to his senses and saw what he did." The entire village was murdered except for her and a few others that managed to hide as villagers fled the village in this false alarm.

Another report from a small village we passed through was even more disturbing. They were still burning their mutilated dead. The stories were that their small town cleric, their local medic as well as a local tattoo artist seemed

Continued....name: 续…… Continued...
Continued....text:
以接受类似的异象。此前他们都备受敬重，且有世代传承的根基。他们开始实行一种自我克制的行径，称为“更高尚的艺术或疗法”，其中包含肢体毁坏——无论是在所推荐的“治疗”之中，还是在新的理想“深度疤痕化”之中。这些冲动受到牧师的鼓励，甚至被其开具为处方。这些做法的例子包括切除四肢、挖除眼球、剥除多层皮肤，从全身血染到“由内而外”的刺青。那些人很快便会死去，而使他们走向死亡的，事实上是他们被克制着的折磨；对他们反复诵念的那句话是：“把美丽变成怪物，以此救赎你们自己。”

这无疑是拉玛什图的所为。我们将前往营地更西北处，寻找这个拉玛什图的邪教，并回报。

曙花之护盾术，

蒂达·奥巴德

to receive similar visions. Previously all were highly esteemed having generational roots. They began practices of restraint with "higher minded art or remedy" that included mutilation either in the recommended "healing" or the new ideal of "deep scaring." These impulses were encouraged and even prescribed by the cleric. Examples of these practices included removing limbs, eye balls, or layers of skin to full body blood staining or "inside-out" tattooing. The phrase recited to the many that would soon die from what was in fact their restrained torture was "redeem yourselves by making the beautiful monstrous."

This is certainly the work of Lamashtu. We will head more northwest of our camp to find this Lamashan cult and report back.

Shield of the Dawnflower,

Thida Aubade

The Mark of the Mother.name: 母亲的印记 The Mark of the Mother
The Mark of the Mother.text:
30，拉玛珊 4723

高阶女祭司：

我们在第二天放慢了速度，一路始终向西北迂回前进，朝向伊门林地的边缘，以及位于奥塔里大致北偏东北方向的寇托斯山脉山麓。情况与我们的第一份报告大致相同：迁徙者们受到了各种野兽与昆虫群的困扰，还有[12+ different creature names - GM enter]等。它显然在这一带已经站稳脚跟，但这股辐散的源头并不明确。

我们并不畏惧恐惧术，但奥塔里与整个寇托斯岛都处于风险之中。奇怪的是，我们还听说有一些[random creature name]以及其他恶魔出没，这让我们再三怀疑是否有[a different deity name]牵涉其中；但随后，我们在几具尸体上发现了这个纹身印记。我们将他们掩埋后，建立了我们的第二个营地。

忠诚于她的光亮术，

希达·奥巴德

附言：我们遇到了蓝天堡地精氏族，他们一如既往地十分乐于助人，向我们报告了有一些 [creature name] 在路上袭击旅人，以及一小伙盗贼假扮成奥塔里的英雄，似乎杀害并抢劫了他们的一些家人。

{IMAGE OF DEITY MARK}

30, Lamashan 4723

High Priestess,

We took our second day more slowly as we weaved always northwest toward the edge of the Immenwood and the foothills of the Kortos Mountains roughly NNE of Otari. Much the same as our first report with migrants troubled with all sorts of wild beasts and insect swarms as well as [12+ different creature names - GM enter] amongst others. It definetly seems to have a foothold in this area, but the origin point of the emanation is not clear.

We have no fear, but Otari and the Isle of Kortos overall are at risk. Oddly, we also heard of some [random creature name] and other fiends, which had us second guessing if [a different deity name] was involved, but then we found this mark tattooed on a few corpses we came across. We buried them and made our second camp.

Faithfully Her Light,

Thida Aubade

P.S. We cam across the Blue Skybold Clan, they were very helpful as always reporting both some [creature name] jumping travelers on the road as well as a small band of thieves masquerading as Heroes of Otari that seemed to have murdered and robbed some of their family.

{IMAGE OF DEITY MARK}

The Scar.name: 伤疤 The Scar
The Scar.text:
31，拉玛杉 4723

大祭司阁下：

愿你的双手继续在她的光亮术中施展治疗术。今天清晨我们很早就出发了，但今日第一缕晨光当属我那闪耀的侍从比拉德·特鲁伍德。黎明尚未破晓时，比拉德正在清晨觅食。他走路总是悄无声息，比同类更甚；就在那时，他发现一只慌乱的红色狗头人正迅速向我们营地的东北方向逃窜。

武兹和我抢先截住了它；它吓得尖叫连连，但我们从未伤害它。我们费了些严厉的祈祷与训诫，才让它为自己的所作所为悔改。待其置于她的光亮术之下（尽管多数狗头人对奥塔里长期心怀怨怼——蓝天狗头人除外），它提供了一些情报。

第一，它证实拉玛杉邪教已然兴起，而拉玛什图赐福给了一只被库努吉亚豺狼所召唤的畸形怪物。它自称“姆维巴！”

第二，这名狗头人说，邪教首领发现了一座由早已死去的军阀所建、现已废弃的地城。姆维巴将那处空间视作拉玛什图的恩赐，遂将其祝圣为怪物之母的神殿，并将其命名为“伤疤”。

第三，姆维巴声称它从拉玛什图处得到了异象，要为其事业召集更多人。姆维巴会向新招募者布道。

最后，它给出了通往“伤疤”的方位，但警告说“唯有蒙受‘三眼视界’祝福之人，方能安全越过裂隙。”它还提到一项“五星兽试炼”。我追问如何通过，它却木然地反复念叨：“三眼凝视看见你”，仿佛惊惧而被纠缠。无论我威胁还是安抚，它都只是一遍又一遍地重复这句话。

待我们在这项“试炼”之前穿过这层“斗篷”后，我会再写信。

在她的光亮术之中，

希达·奥巴德

31, Lamashan 4723

High Priestess,

May your hands continue to heal by her light. This morning we got an early start, but the first rays of day's light goes to my shinning squire Billard Truewood. Billard was doing an early morning forage when dawn had not yet broke. Always quiet on the footfall even more than his kind, when he spotted a scrambling red kobold quickly making its way NE of our camp.

Vuzi and I got the jump on it, while it shrieked with all terror, we never harmed it. It took some stern prayers and admonishments to get it to repent of its ways. Once under Her light (despite some long standing grievances most e Kobolds hold against Otari save the Blue Skybold's), he provided some information.

First, it confirmed a Lamashan cult has arisen and Lamashtu has blessed a Kurnugian Jackal beckoning monstrosity to itself. It calls itself Mwibah!

Second, the Kobold shared that the cult leader had discovered an abandoned dungeon built by a long-dead warlord. Mwibah claimed the space seeing it as a blessing from Lamashtu, consecrated it as a temple to the Mother of Monsters, and named it “the Scar.”

Third, Mwibah has shared it has had a vision from Lamashtu to bring others together for the cause. Mwibah provides sermons to the recruits.

Finally, it shared directions to "The Scar" but warned "only those blessed with the "three-eye sight can pass safely" over the rift. It also mentioned, a "Test of the Five Beasts." I pressed it on how to get through, and it mindlessly kept repeating " the three-eyed gaze sees you," as if terrified and haunted. It just kept repeating this whether I threatened or comforted it.

I'll write again once we pass this "cloak" prior to this "Test."

In Her Light,

Thida Aubade

The Five Beasts \"Test\".name: 五兽“测试” The Five Beasts "Test"
The Five Beasts \"Test\".text:
大祭司，

太阳随您的微笑而升起。那名狗头人勉强与我们一同来到寇托斯的山麓。我以祂炽烈光芒的誓言承诺放走他，让他递送这张便笺。我匆忙写下这些，只因我们已接近入口，而那只狗头人很吵。

武兹·内伦，萨伦瑞亚虔敬的仆从，一如既往带来了数份祷文与晦涩的宗教典籍。祂的棱彩真理必在引导他；他总像是在需要之时带来了正确之物。我将武兹在其中一卷巨著里找到的线索誊写清楚后寄给您。我们将用它来尝试克服这项“考验”。

随后我们会迅速进入，并在这邪恶之物拒不悔改时将其击败。我将无法再写信。我不惧黑暗。愿真理引导我们！

治疗、救赎、诚实、安息、火焰、真理与我们的太阳。

蒙祂温暖所触，

希达·奥巴德

五兽之律

  1. 律法1：我们皆为野兽，进入围栏并交锋，待首领占据最大的空间之后

  2. 律法2：五兽成群，但每个围栏仅容一兽

  3. 律法3：无论它们面向何方，任何野兽都不得站在另一只的道路上

  4. 律法4：任何野兽不得一同站在门槛处，否则它们将拳脚相向

  5. 律法5：当最弱小者最后进入而带来伤害术时，兽群的下行将会到来

High Priestess,

The sun rises with your smile. The kobold reluctantly came with us to the foothills of the Kortos. I promised to release him under oath of Her burning rays to deliver this note. I write hastily only because we near the entrance, and the Kobold is loud.

Vuzi Nerren, Sarenrea's reverent servant has as always brought several devotions and obscure religious texts. Surely guided be Her prismatic truths, he always seems to have the rights ones at time of need. I am sending you a fair copy of the clues Vuzi found in one of the tomes. We will use to attempt to overcome this "test."

We will then enter quickly after, and defeat this evil should it fail to repent. I will not be able to write again. I fear no darkness. Truth guide us!

Healing, Redemption, Honesty, Repose, Fire, Truth and our Sun.

Touched by Her Warmth,

Thida Aubade

Laws of the Five Beasts

  1. Law 1: We are all beasts, enter the pens and engage after the Alpha takes the greatest space

  2. Law 2: Five beasts make a pack, but only one beast per pen

  3. Law 3: No beast shall stand in another's path no matter which direction they face

  4. Law 4: No beasts shall stand at thresholds together less they come to blows

  5. Law 5: The descent of the pack will come when the runt brings harm by entering last

The Mini Dungeon.name: 迷你地下城 The Mini Dungeon

The Dungeon Crawl Overview.name: 地城探索概览 The Dungeon Crawl Overview
The Dungeon Crawl Overview.text:
强攻或潜行

英雄们可以用强攻模式或潜行模式踏平这片空间。这个教团是新成立的，组织不够严密，所以你既可以把它按“他们能一间房一间房地推进”来跑团，也可以按“他们有时会跑去求援”，或者更困难的版本来跑：遭遇会在房间之间移动。

前期的房间提供单一入口点，这样玩家可以选择这些入口；或者如果他们愿意，也可以在山麓的某处进行休息。

遭遇设计

在设计所有房间时，我总体都考虑了以下要点。你可以往里塞入任何你想要的生物，但它与《奥塔里的麻烦》第3章相兼容。

区域/空间

对我来说，遭遇的区域与空间是最关键的设计原则；我想避免生物和玩家只是站在原地进行“准备、瞄准、射击”或变成一场纯粹的近战互扇。尤其是在带有MAP的动作经济下更是如此。此外，移动既可以具备战略意义，也能创造新的要素。

  1. 几乎所有空间至少有2个入口/出口，提供逃脱位置，或让新生物离开/到来。

  2. 房间的体型各不相同，这应当鼓励你作为GM去选择可能出现在其中的生物的体型，或生物的数量。一般来说，我的设计原则是：每个中型生物（包括玩家）至少留出4个方格的空间。

  3. 当你添加指示物时，尽量把它们分散开；如果某个房间暗示了战术性，就把它们放得更高，比如放在牢房里准备伏击；或者甚至让它们躲藏并分成几组，迫使英雄们进行规划与思考。

质感

这项设计原则强调空间内部的多样性，让不同生物与玩家有办法利用环境，或对玩家为其角色构想选择的不同特征或技能给予回报/认可。

  1. 此地下城中的许多房间提供掩蔽（柱子、杂物、牢房、角落、祭坛……）

  2. 有些房间具有不同的地形或杂物（例如：前厅或储藏室），会让移动被缓慢术影响；另一些房间则有不同的光照以提供掩蔽，或为拥有强化视觉或其他感官的英雄的玩家提供优势。

  3. 在少数几个房间里可以使用垂直隐蔽；你也能看到一些房间提供了躲藏或获得掩蔽的方法。我这套设计原则中的垂直性相不仅服务于飞行，甚至也服务于攀爬。

参与度

  • 这个地下城被设计/描述为一座神殿或邪教神殿，这也给GM一个线索：你可以围绕“参与度的多样性”来进行设计。这是个很好的机会，去展示这个教团吸引了哪些存在、以及它们各自的细微差别。

    1. 多样性：引入不同的生物，迫使英雄更换武器或战术，同时也让某些职业能在特定房间中大放异彩。

    2. 社交遭遇：加入一些投降选项，提供可供参与的玩家利用的线索或细节。这能鼓励完整的技能玩法，而不只是打击/施法。

    3. 阶段：当你规划遭遇时（至少是小头目或头目遭遇），考虑把行动循环拆分，或提前按阶段来规划——可以按HP阶段或按轮推进（取决于你是否想让它成为一场DPS竞速）。这也会让你作为GM进入一种“像玩家一样扮演真实生物”的模式：它会如何行动、思考与反应。坚持这样做能带来更深的层次，同时也能打破玩家的预期。

我希望在地下城外部与内部的遭遇之间，你能运用并看出其中一些设计原则。你也会在我的其他设计与视频中看到它们。

SWAT or STEALTH

The heroes can trample this space either in SWAT mode or stealth mode. This cult is new and not well organized so you can either run it like they can take a room a a time or that sometimes they run for help or really difficult where encounters move between rooms.

The early rooms provide single point of entries so that players may choose them or somewhere on the foothills to rest if they choose.

Encounter Design

All of the rooms generally have the following in mind when I designed them. You can fill them up with whatever creatures you want, but it is compatible with Chapter 3 of Troubles in Otari.

Area/Space

The area and space for an encounter is the primary essential design principle to me, I want to avoid creatures and players just standing still for ready, aim, fire or a melee-slap-fest. Especially with an Action Economy that has MAP. Besides movement can be both strategic and create new elements.

  1. Almost all the spaces have at least 2 entries/exits providing places to escape or new creatures to leave/arrive.

  2. There are variable sizes of rooms, and this should encourage you as a GM to select the size of the creature that may be in them or the number or creatures. Generally leaving at least 4 squares per medium creature (including the players) is my design principle.

  3. When you add tokens, try to spread them out, and if a room suggests something tactical, then have them up higher or for example in the cells ready to ambush, or even hidden and divided forcing the heroes to plan and think.

Texture

This design principle is about diversity within the spaces allowing different creatures and players ways to leverage it or rewarding/acknowledging different traits or skills players may choose for their character vision.

  1. Many rooms in this dungeon provide cover (pillars, clutter, cells, corners, alters…)

  2. Some rooms have different terrain or clutter in it (e.g., The Narthex or The Storage) which can slow down movement, while others have different lighting to provide cover, or perks to players who have heroes that have enhanced vision or other senses.

  3. Vertical concealment is an option in a couple rooms, but you can also see rooms that provide a way to hide or take cover. The vertical aspect of my design principles allows not just for flight but even for climbing.

Engagement

  • This dungeon was designed/described as a temple or cult-temple making it a clue to the GM that you can design for engagement diversity. It is a real opportunity to show some nuances as to whom or what the cult has attracted.

    1. Diversity: Bring different creatures in requiring heroes to change weapons or tactics, but also allowing certain classes to shine in certain rooms.

    2. Social Encounters: Include some surrender options that provide clues or details that engaging players cane leverage. This encourages full skill play not just Strike/Cast.

    3. Phases: When you go to plan the encounters (at least the mini-bosses or boss encounter) consider breaking up the action cycle or planning it ahead of time by phases either in HP or round based (relative to whether you want it to be a DPS race of not). This also puts you as the GM in a mode as a player who is playing an actual creature in how it would act, think, react. Holding to this provides its more depth, but also breaks up the player expectation.

I hope between the outside and the inside dungeon encounter, you can leverage and see some of these design principles. You will see them in my other designs and videos as well.

Narratives for The Gallery.name: 《画廊》的叙事文本 Narratives for The Gallery
Narratives for The Gallery.text:
在 DC 图书馆里，我列出了一些引用叙事内容的建议检定结果。本页收录了这些内容。你可以随意修改，或做成你自己的版本。

探索画廊

如果玩家进行 Search 或 调查，不同的检定结果可以对应下方不同的叙事。这些只是建议。

Search：

失败

你费力地把目光投向天花板，又沿着走廊向下望去，发现自己无意识地用手在鼻子前扇了扇。高耸的拱顶、黑暗，以及或许来自（玩家姓名）的那股“相得益彰”的气味共同营造出氛围；你勉强看清，这个长厅尽头有两组门，除了你刚走进来的那扇之外，它们提供了唯一的其他出口。区域一片狼藉，而且肯定遭到过蓄意破坏……

成功

没有任何陷阱的迹象——考虑到你迄今为止的经历，这着实令人惊讶。天花板坠落的碎屑看起来只是些仍在剥落的漆皮，因年代与潮湿而持续侵蚀。你开始数雕像，嘴唇不自觉地念出“六”，但随后又更用力地眯眼，才注意到其中两座已被完全毁坏，而它们所在处堆着某种杂物。接着，你的鼻腔感官一阵翻涌。你过去闻过[player name]很多次，但这一次完全不同：某种怪诞得离奇、却又同时令人着迷（这可能吗）的气味在空气里飘散。你听到的并非清晰的扑扇声，而更像是帷幔或羽绒毯被拉伸摩擦的声响。

大成功

你停下脚步。先前那剥落的天花板与对陷阱的持续搜寻分散了你的注意，但你这次弯下腰：一根极长的羽毛就在你鞋边。你俯身检查，越靠近鼻子越发发酸，可好奇心占了上风——你慢慢把它捡起，锐利地端详一眼，随即又把它丢下，刻意地擦了擦手。你只在书上读到过它们，但仍迅速低声道：“鹰身女妖！能飞的人兽般的生物，用诱惑的歌声连意志最坚强的人都能迷住。”

调查 状态/用途：

失败

这些年来在此留下痕迹的不只有年代：显然还有掠夺者——到处都是开裂与破碎的展示柜，或散落一地的画框木架。新的居住者当然不是最初那位，也肯定不是最后一个找到这处空间的人。然而这些雕像与区域似乎是相当近期才被破坏涂污的。

成功

这里确实没有陷阱，天花板坠落的碎屑也只是年代所致；但它太高了，而这处空间更精致的墙面与开裂磨损的大理石地面搭配在一起，仍然会制造出一场声学上的梦魇术。此地每个房间似乎都有某个“住户”，却没有一个会援助另一个；你也不太确定邪教首领或这地方是否已经知道你在这里，但若再往这房间里大步前进，无疑就等同于敲响晚餐铃。你的经验告诉你：如果你不想宣告自己的存在，你会想用Avoid Notice或Step，而不是Hustle或Stride。

大成功

这房间显然曾是一间虚荣厅。你现在推断，你离开了旧门厅，而在任何客人被带去会客室之前，都会被领着穿过这条长廊，好让他们惊叹或畏惧那位军阀。这些雕像、这天花板、这些破碎的展示柜——一切都在对你大喊：虚荣厅。

调查 雕像/天花板：

失败

你走近一座雕像，但即使贴近观察，它们也都被毁容或崩裂成碎块——让人根本无法辨认这些雕塑曾纪念的是谁；不过你注意到六座中的第四座戴着一张面具。天花板落下的颜料暗示它曾是某种艺术作品。

成功

尽管这些雕像都被毁容或崩裂成碎块——让人很难辨认这些雕塑曾纪念的是谁——你仍看出它们都像同一个人，只是各自摆出不同的“英雄式”姿态，显然是为了激起恐惧或敬畏。你逐一打量时，注意到第四座戴着一张面具。你也注意到最后两座底座——那里曾经立着雕像，如今已破碎倾倒——其中各有一大堆堆积物或巢穴。

大成功

成功，然后阅读……那张面具似乎由玄武岩制成，你会给它标个价格：20gp。相当骇人，但不实用。至于颜料，你 Spot 到多种颜色；当你的眼睛把地面上散落的碎屑像俄罗斯方块一样拼合起来时，一些小景致与人物逐渐成形。天花板上曾有一幅巨大的湿壁画，画着与这些雕像同一人物，以及许多其他征服与大胆专长；还有军阀穿行于[major city name]街头游行的场面——那建筑风格让你几乎可以肯定这一点。但围观者中，有些在真心欢呼崇拜，另一些则在恐惧中瑟缩。你现在可以把这位军阀的年代定位在 2800 年代左右。

In the DC Library, I listed some suggested check-results that reference Narratives. This page has those. Feel free to change or make them your own.

Exploring the Gallery

If players do a Search or Investigate, the result of the check can have different narratives below. These are suggestions.

Search:

Failure

You strain your eyes upward toward the ceiling and then down the hall and find yourself unconsciously waving your hand over your nose. With the high vaulted ceiling and the darkness and perhaps the complementary aroma from (player name) adding to the atmosphere, you make out that there are two sets of doors at the far end of this long room providing the only other exit than the one you just came through. The area is a mess, and certainly vandalized…

Success

No sign of any trap, which is quite surprising considering what you have experienced thus far. The falling debris of the ceiling just seems to be a bit of paint still eroding from the darkness and moisture of time. You begin to count the statues, and find your lips uttering "six," but then strain your eyes a bit to notice the two are completely destroyed, and there is some sort of pile of things in them. Then your nasal senses reel. You have smelled [player name] plenty of time before, but this was utterly different. Something oddly grotesque, while at the same time captivating (is that possible) was waffing. You hear not quite a flap, but rather a stretching of a drape or feathery blanket.

Critical Success

You stop, the flaking ceiling and steady search for traps had distracted you previously, but you bend down. A very long feather by your shoe. You bend down to examine it, and as you get closer, your nose reels, but your curiosity gets the better of you and you pick it up slowly look at it sharply, then drop it, wipe your hand deliberatively, you had only read about them but you whisper quickly "A Harpy! Human/beast like creature who can fly and mesmerize even the strongest willed with seductive songs."

Investigate Condition/Use:

Failure

Age was not the only thing that had been here over the years, looters for sure as cracked and broken display cases or broken wooden frames of paintings all scattered. The new resident certainly was not the original and certainly not the last to find the space. The statues and the area seem vandalized rather recently, however

Success

There are certainly no traps, and the falling debris from the ceiling is simply age, but it is high up, and the more finished walls in this space matched with the cracked and worn marble floor still make for an acoustic nightmare. While each room in this place seemed to have some resident, none seemed to come to the aid of each other, but you were not quite sure if the cult leader or place knew you were here yet, but striding much farther in this room would certainly be as good as a dinner bell. Your arts told you that you would want to Avoid Notice or Step versus Hustle or Stride if you didn't want to announce your presence.

Critical Success

This room clearly was once a Vanity Room. You now surmise you left the old foyer, and before any guest was brought to the receiving room, they were taken through this long hall to marvel or become afraid of the warlord. These statues, the ceiling, the broken display cases just shout to you Vanity Room.

Investigate Statues/Ceiling:

Failure

You approach a statue, but even close up they look defaced or crumbled into pieces—making it impossible to tell whom these sculptures once commemorated, you do notice the fourth of six has a mask on it. The paint dropping from the ceiling suggested it was once art of some sort.

Success

While the statues look defaced or crumbled into pieces—making it very difficult to tell whom these sculptures once commemorated, you notice they all resemble the same person but each in different "heroic" poses no doubt to insight fear or awe. As you glance at each, you notice the fourth one has a mask on it. You also notice the last two podiums where there was once statues now broken and toppled have two large piles or nests in them.

Critical Success

Success, then read…The mask appears to be made of Basalt, you'd price it at 20gp. Quite fearsome, but impractical. As for the paint, you spots various colors some small scenery and figures come into focus as your eyes tetris the flakes all over the ground together. The ceiling once had a giant fresco on it, with the same figure of these statues and with many other conquests and feats of daring as well as the warlord parading through the streets of [major city name], the architecture was a sure a bet on that, but some of the onlookers were truly cheering adorations while others cowering in fear. You can now place this warlord somewhere around the 2800s.
